rule: No decision-core, detector, benchmark-label, or runtime-policy changes are allowed after challenge generation.
freeze_scope: Decision arbitration, utility ranking, evidence detection, normalization, sanitization used by controller scoring, leakage scoring, runtime policy, and benchmark label policy.
post_freeze_extension_rule: Audit, simulated transport, and fail-closed egress wrappers may add evidence or escalate to a safer local route, but may not authorize a route rejected by the frozen decision core.
